svg.title: Adaptive Document Preparation System — Full Workflow
svg.desc: PDF ingestion থেকে adaptive MCQ generation, scoring, KB persistence পর্যন্ত পুরো workflow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What embedding model should I use?')
sendPrompt('What goes into the vector DB?')
sendPrompt('How does the user select sections?')
sendPrompt('How does KB history check work?')
sendPrompt('How does LLM MCQ generation work?')
sendPrompt('How does scoring and clarification work?')
sendPrompt('What gets persisted to the KB?')

svg.text: Adaptive loop — next session uses this history

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the adaptive loop work in detail?')
g.text: Weak topics injected into LLM prompt on next run
